title: Flyto2 community growth for open-source AI workflow automation
description: A short engineering video that turns the Flyto2 community post into a clear YouTube-ready walkthrough for contributors and builders.

scenes.title: Open-source AI workflow automation should be easy to trust.
scenes.body: Flyto2 keeps the runtime, docs, issues, and examples visible so contributors can inspect the loop.

scenes.title: One source, many useful surfaces.
scenes.body: A blog post links to docs, GitHub issues, package pages, and the community hub instead of scattering the story.

scenes.title: Good-first work matters.
scenes.body: Small issues, reproducible recipes, and showcase prompts help new contributors do real work without guessing.

scenes.title: Social posts should be reviewed, not sprayed.
scenes.body: Flyto2 drafts LinkedIn, Facebook, GitHub, YouTube, and package-page copy from one plan, then keeps live publishing behind maintainer approval.

scenes.title: Every claim points back to evidence.
scenes.body: The canonical article, docs, and open-source repositories stay linked so viewers can verify details before trying the tool.

scenes.title: Join the Flyto2 community.
scenes.body: Start from flyto2.com/community, pick one issue, share one recipe, or show one automation that worked.

youtube.description: A short Flyto2 community walkthrough for open-source AI workflow automation builders. Canonical post: https://blog.flyto2.com/posts/community-growth-open-source-ai-workflow-automation
